seoTitle: Kellyville Ridge vs Kelvin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Kellyville Ridge vs Kelvin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kellyville Ridge and Kelvin.
heading: Kellyville Ridge vs Kelvin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kellyville Ridge, New South Wales and Kelvin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kelvin has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kellyville Ridge (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kellyville Ridge or Kelvin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kellyville Ridge has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Kelvin scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kellyville Ridge scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Kelvin scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kellyville Ridge or Kelvin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kelvin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
